name: job-app-server
description: Express API. Deploy on Vercel: set MONGODB_URI (or MONGODB_USER/MONGODB_PASSWORD/MONGODB_HOST), ADMIN_USER, ADMIN_PASSWORD, JWT_SECRET. Vercel functions cap request bodies at 4.5MB—large video uploads need client direct-to-storage (e.g. Vercel Blob), not multer through this app. Static files: use public/ (express.static is not used on Vercel).
